tasks.label: Create and Push Git Tag
tasks.command: echo 'Enter tag name (e.g., v1.0.0):' && read tag && if [ -z "$tag" ]; then echo 'Tag name cannot be empty!'; exit 1; fi && git tag -a "$tag" -m "Release $tag" && git push origin "$tag"
tasks.detail: Create an annotated tag and push it to GitHub (interactive)

tasks.label: Create Git Tag (Local)
tasks.command: echo 'Enter tag name (e.g., v1.0.0):' && read tag && if [ -z "$tag" ]; then echo 'Tag name cannot be empty!'; exit 1; fi && git tag -a "$tag" -m "Release $tag"
tasks.detail: Create a local annotated tag only (interactive)

tasks.label: Push All Tags
tasks.detail: Push all local tags to GitHub

tasks.label: Delete Local Tag
tasks.command: echo 'Enter tag name to delete (local):' && read tag && if [ -z "$tag" ]; then echo 'Tag name cannot be empty!'; exit 1; fi && git tag -d "$tag"

tasks.label: Delete Remote Tag
tasks.command: echo 'Enter tag name to delete (remote):' && read tag && if [ -z "$tag" ]; then echo 'Tag name cannot be empty!'; exit 1; fi && git push origin --delete "$tag"
tasks.detail: Delete a remote tag from GitHub (interactive)
